findings.finding: 论文核心模型假设为 small open economy，但未对该假设在大国（如美国、中国）下的适用性进行充分讨论。论文中明确指出模型设定为 small open economy，且假设该国工资不受关税影响，但未讨论该假设在大国背景下的合理性和局限性。
findings.evidence: "We focus on a small open economy model, with two sectors s = 1, 2 and roundabout production in both sectors..."（appendix: a two-sector small open economy model）; "County i is a small open economy, and the foreign country j ≠ i is the rest of the world."（2节）; "The traded numeraire good pins down relative wages between countries, so the country applying tariffs is 'small' in the sense that its wages do not respond to its tariff."（6节）
findings.section: appendix: a two-sector small open economy model

findings.finding: 论文从理论模型（两部门 small open economy, roundabout production）过渡到定量模型（186国、15部门、EORA数据校准）时，符号映射、参数定义、关键公式（如 second-best tariff 固定点方程）在正文与附录间未完全透明，部分推导跳跃较大，读者难以追踪理论到数值实现的精确桥接。
findings.evidence: "We obtain the optimal uniform, second-best tariff as a fixed point of a formula that has two new terms: a M term that reflects the relative monopoly distortion between the traded and non-traded sectors; and a R term that reflects roundabout production in the traded sector, which amplifies the monopoly distortion there. In a 186-country, 15-sector quantitative version of the model, the optimal uniform tariff has a median value of only 10%..." | "We obtain the optimal uniform, second-best tariff as a fixed point of a nonlinear equation in the calibrated model..."（5节）; "The quantitative model from our working paper (CFRT, 2020) uses the EORA dataset..."（5节）; "Appendix A contains the full model..."（2节）

findings.finding: 多张表格存在100%相同的数值单元，极有可能是制表错误（复制粘贴重复），如果这些表格代表不同的处理或样本，数据应当不同，需作者核查数据表的准确性。
findings.evidence: 自动检测提示（Heuristic Hints）中多条检测结果，均指向不同表格间存在100%相同的数值单元，极有可能是复制粘贴错误，涉及表格包括table_3, table_13, table_16, table_18, table_19, table_20, table_21, table_26, table_28, table_31, table_34, table_38, table_42, table_43, table_44, table_46, table_47, table_48, table_49, pdf_table_19, pdf_table_21, pdf_table_32, pdf_table_37等。
